metadata.description: godaudits: an evidence-first audit system with 419 checks, form-aware context, Pillars and arc-ready validation, OWASP 2025 coverage, deterministic scoring, SARIF, and executable remediation plans.

plugins.name: godaudits
plugins.description: Audit a codebase across 18 domains with a complete check ledger, typed evidence, deterministic scoring, SARIF, and an executable remediation plan.
